report_name: Samsung Rolls Out June 2026 Security Patch, Fixing 45 Vulnerabilities

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2025-48595
vulnerabilities.description: An actively exploited zero-day vulnerability in Android Framework and System components, patched in Google's June 2026 Android Security Bulletin and included in Samsung's June 2026 Security Maintenance Release.

vulnerabilities.name: Samsung Vulnerabilities and Exposures (June 2026)
vulnerabilities.description: A set of 11 vulnerabilities specific to Samsung's software, including One UI, Samsung-specific apps, and hardware drivers, that were patched in the June 2026 Security Maintenance Release.

vulnerabilities.name: Exynos Processor Vulnerability (June 2026)
vulnerabilities.description: A vulnerability specific to Samsung's Exynos line of processors, patched as part of the June 2026 Security Maintenance Release.

identities.name: Samsung Galaxy Devices
identities.description: The product line of Samsung mobile devices, including smartphones, tablets, and foldables, affected by 45 vulnerabilities patched in the June 2026 Security Maintenance Release.
